original_statement: were any coaches not of denmark nationality?
mutated_statement: were any coaches not of a single nationality while also all being of that nationality?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Logical contradiction insertion + Quantifier shift + Conjunction addition: "denmark" → "a single nationality" (specific → generic) | added clause "while also all being of that nationality" (introduces internal contradiction) | "any" (existential) vs "all" (universal) quantifier clash | negation scope changed from "not of X" → "not of a single X while also all being X" (were any coaches not of denmark nationality? → were any coaches not of a single nationality while also all being of that nationality?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据agent的judge_thought（“The nationality column lists 'denmark' for every coach, meaning all coaches share the same nationality and there are no exceptions.”）可识别出关键事实：agent注意到数据中所有教练均为丹麦籍并直接用该事实解释了变异问题中的内部矛盾。具体表现为：没有拒绝回答或向用户澄清矛盾，而是用数据事实和逻辑推理说明“同时存在互斥条件在此数据下无法成立”，从而以事实为依据合理化矛盾命题。该行为与“合理化矛盾指令”中的逻辑解释合理化（1.b）完全一致——agent并未通过折中操作或忽视矛盾，而是用事实/逻辑直接证明矛盾条件不可实现并给出结论。
